scripts.serve: npm run build -w apps/web && node tools/serve.mjs
scripts.test: node --test --test-concurrency=1 packages/shared/test/*.test.ts packages/course-architect/test/*.test.ts packages/model-runtime/test/*.test.ts packages/evaluator/test/*.test.ts packages/simulator/test/*.test.ts packages/session-events/test/*.test.ts packages/instructor/test/*.test.ts packages/learner-model/test/*.test.ts packages/lab-runtime/test/*.test.ts apps/api/test/*.test.ts apps/web/test/*.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:kernel: node --test packages/shared/test/*.test.ts packages/course-architect/test/*.test.ts packages/model-runtime/test/*.test.ts packages/evaluator/test/*.test.ts packages/simulator/test/*.test.ts packages/session-events/test/*.test.ts packages/instructor/test/*.test.ts packages/learner-model/test/*.test.ts
